mainEntity.name: Can I claim lost overtime in West Valley City slip comp?
mainEntity.text: Can I claim lost overtime in West Valley City slip comp?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes if overtime regular pre-injury Utah comp calculates AWW including overtime up to 260 weeks.[7]

suggestedAnswer.text: Prove pattern with paystubs. Insurers exclude arguing temporary. Appeals uphold if documented. Impacts settlement value significantly for hourly workers.[7]

name: Overtime in West Valley City Comp Calculations
description: Yes if overtime regular pre-injury Utah comp calculates AWW including overtime up to 260 weeks.[7]
